channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed

item.title: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day. n.pr/4pbMl9q
item.content:encoded: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day. n.pr/4pbMl9q

item.title: From Santa Fe to Akron, these five cassette labels prove tha…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: From Santa Fe to Akron, these five cassette labels prove that some of the most adventurous music still comes wrapped in plastic. Discover your next favorite tape.
item.content:encoded: From Santa Fe to Akron, these five cassette labels prove that some of the most adventurous music still comes wrapped in plastic. Discover your next favorite tape.

item.title: Spring's best albums are here. These are the records our edi…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description:
Spring's best albums are here. These are the records our editors couldn't stop returning to over the last three months.

See the full list, then tell us what's on your Best of Spring.
item.content:encoded:
Spring's best albums are here. These are the records our editors couldn't stop returning to over the last three months.

See the full list, then tell us what's on your Best of Spring.

item.title: One hundred demons? In this economy? Believe it or not, the …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: One hundred demons? In this economy? Believe it or not, the Connecticut metalcore heroes are back with their first album in 22 years. That and so much more on this month’s Best Metal on Bandcamp.
item.content:encoded: One hundred demons? In this economy? Believe it or not, the Connecticut metalcore heroes are back with their first album in 22 years. That and so much more on this month’s Best Metal on Bandcamp.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sen…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.
item.content:encoded: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.description: Zach Bryan previews songs from new EP 'Young Manhood And Other Donatable Organs'
item.content:encoded: Zach Bryan previews songs from new EP 'Young Manhood And Other Donatable Organs'

item.title: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of wa…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of water, schistosomiasis causes debilitating symptoms. It hits kids hard. A board game teaches how to prevent it. n.pr/4eLWZQG
item.content:encoded: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of water, schistosomiasis causes debilitating symptoms. It hits kids hard. A board game teaches how to prevent it. n.pr/4eLWZQG

item.title: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project ta…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic." n.pr/4ymdsCX
item.content:encoded: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic." n.pr/4ymdsCX

item.title: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the milit…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping. n.pr/4f2fxLm
item.content:encoded: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping. n.pr/4f2fxLm

item.title: Organizers called off the Independence Day Parade late Frida…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Organizers called off the Independence Day Parade late Friday, citing an extreme heat warning with temperatures expected to reach up to 115 degrees. The evening fireworks display remains scheduled. n.pr/4eVQ2Lx
item.content:encoded: Organizers called off the Independence Day Parade late Friday, citing an extreme heat warning with temperatures expected to reach up to 115 degrees. The evening fireworks display remains scheduled. n.pr/4eVQ2Lx

item.title: Cape Verde didn't win a match at the World Cup, and somehow,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Cape Verde didn't win a match at the World Cup, and somehow, that didn't seem to matter. The African team's debut on this stage was unforgettable.
item.content:encoded: Cape Verde didn't win a match at the World Cup, and somehow, that didn't seem to matter. The African team's debut on this stage was unforgettable.

item.title: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project ta…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic."
item.content:encoded: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic."

item.title: NPR member station reporters across the U.S. asked people ho…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: NPR member station reporters across the U.S. asked people how they are thinking about their country on its semiquincentennial.
item.content:encoded: NPR member station reporters across the U.S. asked people how they are thinking about their country on its semiquincentennial.

item.title: The unofficially official mantra-turned-tagline of Spacemen …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: The unofficially official mantra-turned-tagline of Spacemen 3, "taking drugs to make music to take drugs to," only scratches the surface. Launch into The Endless Orbit of Spacemen 3.
item.content:encoded: The unofficially official mantra-turned-tagline of Spacemen 3, "taking drugs to make music to take drugs to," only scratches the surface. Launch into The Endless Orbit of Spacemen 3.
